title: Width of workspace pane
excerpt: The workspace pane seems to be too narrow - a lot of our board names get cut off, and you have to hover over then to see the full name. If there a way to adjust the width of the workspace pane? It would be great to be ab…

posts.author: jkumorek (Jim Kumorek)
posts.cookedHtml: The workspace pane seems to be too narrow - a lot of our board names get cut off, and you have to hover over then to see the full name. If there a way to adjust the width of the workspace pane? It would be great to be able to resize its width dynamically, and have it remember the size you set in your account so that it stays that width until you change it again.

posts.author: kathy-qcb (Kathy Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please! I have this same problem.

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, it makes it harder to manage all the low-level boards especially in folders. An alternative idea is if there was a tile view of all the boards in the workspace. I think this could be incorporated if there was a Workspace Homepage.

posts.author: Kalyani (Kalyani)
posts.cookedHtml: We have received the same feedback from our teams and would love to see this feature soon.
